LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE MAY-01-2024 HEARING RE: DEFENDANT LYFT, INC. NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DA FONSECA; NOT REPORTED. (302/RBU)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar May-01-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT LYFT, INC. Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Defendant Lyft, Inc.'s motion to compel arbitration and stay proceedings is granted.

Order signed. (see signed order/word minutes for complete ruling).

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
